hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qEi 'git\s+push\s+(-f|--force)|npm\s+publish|docker\s+push|terraform\s+destroy|kubectl\s+delete\s+(namespace|ns)'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Blocked: destructive or sensitive operation. Ask user for explicit approval."}'; else echo '{"decision": "allow"}'; fi

INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qEi '\.env(\.[a-z]+)?"|\.pem"|\.key"|\.cert"|\.p12"|\.pfx"|/\.ssh/|/\.aws/|/\.gnupg/'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Blocked: writing to credential or secret file."}'; else echo '{"decision": "allow"}'; fi
